taxonomy: Motandra paniculata is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. It is a member of the genus Motandra, which is a group of plants primarily found in Central and South America. The family Apocynaceae is a large and diverse group of plants that includes various species of vines, shrubs, and trees. Motandra paniculata is further classified as a perennial plant, which means it grows and thrives year after year.
